title: Self-referential tuple via trailing optional self-ref
description: mion tuple.spec.ts circular tuple. Same mechanism as circular array — Tuple is always non-inlined, the self-recursive dependency call closes the cycle via the isSelf branch.
notes: The cycle closes via a trailing OPTIONAL self-ref slot, so a non-recursive value (the first six slots only) is valid; nested tuples recurse to whatever depth the value supplies.
pureType:
type TupleCircular = [Date, number, string, null, string[], bigint, TupleCircular?];
return createValidate<TupleCircular>();
